description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 10 (Friday), I attended the Saitama Prefecture Mayors' Association regular general meeting. The Saitama Prefecture Mayors' Association is organized by the mayors of all 40 cities in the prefecture. Its purpose is to strengthen coordination and cooperation among cities throughout the prefecture, support smooth and effective municipal administration, and contribute to the development and prosperity of local self-governance.

At this general meeting, we adopted resolutions regarding the securing and enhancement of local general-purpose revenue and the correction of imbalances in revenue sources, and decided to submit requests to the national government based on these resolutions.

Moving forward, we will continue to work together in cooperation to build communities and develop towns that are pleasant places to live.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13447.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Attended Saitama Prefecture Mayors' Association regular general meeting
